api.ends_required: A valid end date/time is required.
api.ends_future: The end must be in the future.
api.enter_login: You must be logged in to enter.
api.enter_closed: This giveaway is not open for entries.
api.enter_min_posts: You need at least {count} posts to enter.
api.enter_too_new: Your account is too new to enter this giveaway.
api.claim_not_winner: You're not a winner of this giveaway.

forum.heading: Giveaways
forum.subheading: Enter for a chance to win. Winners are drawn fairly and verifiably.
forum.empty: No giveaways right now. Check back soon!
forum.earn_post: Post in the community for +{count} bonus {count, plural, one {entry} other {entries}}
forum.req_min_age: Account at least {count} {count, plural, one {day} other {days}} old
forum.no_winners: No eligible entrants — no winners were drawn.
forum.fairness_intro: This draw is verifiable. Anyone can confirm the winners weren't tampered with.
forum.fairness_help: The entrant hash is a SHA-256 fingerprint of the full entrant list, captured at draw time. Combined with the seed, the winner selection is fully reproducible.
forum.you_won_sub: Congratulations — you won {prize}. Claim it so the host knows to send it your way.

categories.confirm_delete: Delete this category? Giveaways in it will become uncategorized.

forum.confirm_delete: Delete this giveaway and all its entries?
forum.confirm_draw: Draw the winners now? This ends the giveaway immediately.

form.description_placeholder: Rules, eligibility, how the prize is delivered…
form.claim_placeholder: e.g. DM me your shipping address or email to receive your prize.
form.claim_help: Shown to each winner after they claim, so they know how to receive the prize.
form.post_bonus_help: One-time bonus granted when an entrant posts anywhere in the community.

admin.nav_label_help: The text shown in the forum navigation for the giveaways page.
admin.show_nav_setting: Show a "Giveaways" link in the main navigation
